headline: Is It Time To Revisit Lockheed Martin (LMT) After The Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether Lockheed Martin's US$581.28 share price still offers value, the recent moves in the stock give you a useful starting point. The shares have slipped 6.2% over the past week and 7.4% over the last month, although the stock is still up 16.9% year to date and 30.3% over the past year. Recent headlines have focused on Lockheed Martin's role in global defense programs and ongoing contract activity. This helps frame how investors think about its long term cash flows and...
